sections.paragraph:
m. pl. seductions, Lam 2:14, from the root נָדַה, see Hiphil No. 3.

I. מָדֹון m. pl. מִדְוָנִים (from the root דִּין).-

(1) contention, strife, Pro 15:18 16:28 17:14 that which is contended for, Psa 80:7.

(2) [Madon], pr.n. of a royal city of the Canaanites, Jos 11:1 12:19 .

II. מָדֹון m. (from the root מָדָה = מָדַד), extension, tallness, 2Sa 21:20 קרי, אִישׁ מָדֹון a tall man, i.q. אִישׁ מִדָּה 1Ch 20:6 כתיב should be read מִדִּין, with the same meaning.
